title: 【转载】致敬819？ 2.24特别军事行动一周年之际克宫将演出《天鹅湖》
meta_description: 【转载】致敬819？ 2.24特别军事行动一周年之际克宫将演出《天鹅湖》 - 文章搬运于一个小报bunatimes，但是克宫演出安排可以查看kremlinpalace官网俄语版。  In the Kremlin, on the anniversary of the start of Russia’s aggressive war a...
meta_keywords: 转载,致敬,819,2.24,特别,军事,行动,一周年,之际,克宫,演出,天鹅湖
contents:
文章搬运于一个小报bunatimes，但是克宫演出安排可以查看kremlinpalace官网俄语版。

In the Kremlin, on the anniversary of the start of Russia’s aggressive war against Ukraine, composer Pyotr Tchaikovsky’s ballet “Swan Lake” will be presented. This was reported on the website of the Kremlin Palace on Friday, February 10.

As the press secretary of the Kremlin Palace, Konstantin Yaroshevsky, said, the date was a coincidence, and the performance itself was planned for a long time in the repertoire. He also confirmed that the ballet was not scheduled to be released that day.

“No, there are no such plans. I understand what you are implying, but it is not connected at all,” said Yaroshevsky in a comment to the Daily Storm.

As you know, the ballet “Swan Lake” became a symbol of the collapse of the USSR. On August 19, 1991, only the broadcast of this performance was shown on television instead of the planned telecasts, while the putsch of the State Emergency Committee was taking place in Moscow.

Earlier on Friday, the media reported that before the anniversary of the invasion of Ukraine, Moscow plans to hold a rally-concert with the participation of Russian President Vladimir Putin. It is expected that up to 200 thousand people will gather for this action on February 22 in Luzhniki.


这一波是敌在宣传部啊，众所周知俄罗斯国粹芭蕾舞《天鹅湖》作为当年819政变的记忆，已经成为一个政变的符号被俄罗斯人津津乐道，而克宫选择在特别军事行动一周年之际演出《天鹅湖》，不知道有何居心，难道克宫也被境外势力渗透了？
